custom.title: Custom itineraries
custom.desc1: Didn't find the right tour? I'll create a custom itinerary based on your preferences, pace and interests — from a single day to a full trip.
custom.desc2: Pick a city or region — and write to me. Let's plan the perfect journey together!
custom.cities: Tokyo, Odawara, Kamakura, Hakone, Mt. Fuji, Izu, Nikko, Kyoto, Osaka, Nara, Kobe, Hiroshima

bonuses.title: Extra bonuses
bonuses.tea_d: An authentic Japanese tea ceremony in a traditional tea house
bonuses.calligraphy_d: Japanese calligraphy workshop with a professional master
bonuses.cooking_d: Make sushi, ramen or other Japanese dishes hands-on
bonuses.kimono_d: Kimono rental, dressing up and a photo walk in traditional attire
bonuses.drift_d: Thrilling drifting at a professional track in Japan
bonuses.onsen_d: Onsen bathing — relax in scenic natural hot spring baths

about.point2: Living in Japan for over 20 years — I know its culture, traditions and everyday life
about.point3: I craft routes that reveal the real Japan, not just the popular spots
about.point4: I help organise your trip end to end

reviews.title: Reviews from my guests
reviews.r1_text: Valentyna is an incredible guide and a lovely person! Japan opened up for us from a different side. Everything was perfectly organised, engaging and heartfelt. Thank you!
reviews.r2_text: We travelled by cruise and took a tour with Valentyna in Tokyo. We saw the most in a short time. A true professional!
reviews.r3_text: Thank you for a magical day in Hakone! The route, the views, the onsen — everything was wonderful. I recommend her wholeheartedly!

toursPage.title: Routes & excursions
toursPage.subtitle: Bespoke tours across Japan — from day trips to multi-day journeys

footer.tagline: Bespoke excursions and private tours across Japan with a licensed Russian- and Ukrainian-speaking guide.

pro-mene.title: About me
body: My name is Valentyna. I'm a licensed guide and escort in Japan and a domestic-tourism manager. I professionally organise journeys across the Tokyo, Hakone, Odawara, Fuji, Kamakura, Izu and Nikko regions.

I live in Japan and study its culture, history and traditions in depth. My focus is private and family tours, group escorting, bespoke routes and themed journeys: samurai history, the legends of Fuji, Hakone crafts, the Edo quarters, temples, cuisine and nature.
I work with individual travellers, families, VIP guests and cruise passengers.

ekskursii.title: Excursions
body: Bespoke excursions across Japan — group and private. I show both the landmark sights and the corners you won't find in guidebooks.
I tailor every route to your pace, interests and group — comfortable both for first-timers and for those who want to know Japan more deeply.

individualni.title: Individual tours
body: Private day routes and multi-day journeys — fully built around your request. You choose the cities, pace and themes; I take care of the organisation.
Ideal for families, couples and small groups who value personal attention and a flexible schedule.

kruizni.title: For cruise guests
body: I'll meet you right at the port and run a full excursion within your ship's call — unhurried, and with a guarantee of getting you back before departure.
I plan the route so that in a few hours you see the most and take home vivid impressions.

transferi.title: Transfers
body: Comfortable transfers between airports, cities and hotels. I'll help with logistics at any stage of your trip.
Meet-and-greet, escorting and transfers — calm and on schedule.

kontakty.title: Contacts
body: Reach out in whatever way suits you — I reply on WhatsApp, Telegram, Viber or by email. I'll be glad to help plan your journey across Japan.
